title: mesosphaerum pumilum
intro: Mesosphaerum pumilum, also known as Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) with a small, delicate appearance and a mint-like fragrance. Traditionally, pennyroyal has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pennyroyal include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. Pennyroyal can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
